## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat:` New feature
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation
- [ ] `refactor:` Code refactoring
- [ ] `test:` Tests
- [ ] `chore:` Build/CI/tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt` applied
- [ ] New code has tests (if applicable)
